experiments.claim_being_tested: Alberta large emitters need 3-pathway TIER comparison (not just fund payment)
experiments.claim: Alberta large emitters need 3-pathway TIER comparison (not just fund payment)
experiments.method: Landing page test — create TIER-specific landing page with 3-pathway comparison value prop and track sign-ups
experiments.success_threshold: ≥5 sign-ups from Alberta industrial emails in 30 days
experiments.decision_rule: If ≥5 sign-ups, proceed to EXP-002 WTP test. If 0 sign-ups, H-TIER-1 is disproven.
experiments.sample_size: Target: 100 visitors from Alberta industrial IP ranges
experiments.sample_description: Target: 100 visitors from Alberta industrial IP ranges
experiments.falsification_potential: HIGH — if no sign-ups, need is not strong enough to drive action
experiments.blocking_potential: HIGH — if this fails, H-TIER-1 is disproven

experiments.claim_being_tested: $1,500/mo is within TIER compliance budget for large emitters
experiments.claim: $1,500/mo is within TIER compliance budget for large emitters
experiments.method: WTP test — outreach to 20 Alberta large emitter compliance leads with pricing upfront and pilot offer
experiments.success_threshold: ≥3 positive responses (interested at $1,500/mo) or ≥1 pilot signup
experiments.failure_threshold: 0 positive responses or all say 'too expensive'
experiments.decision_rule: If ≥3 positive responses, proceed to EXP-004 pilot. If all say too expensive, pricing model is wrong.
experiments.blocking_potential: HIGH — if WTP fails, pricing model is wrong

experiments.claim_being_tested: Source-dated memos are valued over Excel outputs
experiments.claim: Source-dated memos are valued over Excel outputs
experiments.method: Interview — 5 Alberta emitter compliance leads, show CEIP CFO memo vs Excel template, ask which they'd use for board submission
experiments.success_threshold: ≥3 of 5 prefer CEIP memo format for board submission
experiments.decision_rule: If ≥3 prefer CEIP, value prop is validated. If ≤1 prefer, value prop is wrong.
experiments.falsification_potential: MEDIUM — preference ≠ purchase, but validates value prop
experiments.blocking_potential: MEDIUM — if Excel is preferred, value prop is wrong

experiments.claim_being_tested: Pilot: 1 emitter uses TIERROICalculator and produces a CFO memo
experiments.claim: Pilot: 1 emitter uses TIERROICalculator and produces a CFO memo
experiments.method: Pilot — 1 Alberta emitter uses CEIP /roi-calculator with their (redacted) TIER data and produces a board-ready CFO memo
experiments.success_threshold: Emitter produces CFO memo + provides feedback + agrees to testimonial (anonymized)
experiments.failure_threshold: Emitter drops out, or memo is not usable, or emitter says Excel would have been sufficient
experiments.decision_rule: If pilot succeeds, H-TIER-1 is supported. If pilot fails, H-TIER-1 is disproven.
experiments.duration: 2-4 weeks (onboarding + data prep + memo generation + feedback)
experiments.blocking_potential: CRITICAL — if pilot fails, H-TIER-1 is disproven

experiments.claim_being_tested: Alberta TIER compliance consultants will adopt CEIP as client-serving tool
experiments.claim: Alberta TIER compliance consultants will adopt CEIP as client-serving tool
experiments.method: Outreach — contact 10 Alberta energy consultants (Dunsky, ICF, GLJ, EPCs) with CEIP demo and $149/mo Professional tier offer
experiments.success_threshold: ≥2 consultants trial CEIP or schedule demo
experiments.failure_threshold: 0 responses or all say 'we have proprietary tools'
experiments.decision_rule: If ≥2 trial, H-TIER-2 is supported. If 0 responses, consultant channel is not viable.
experiments.blocking_potential: MEDIUM — consultant channel is secondary, not primary

experiments.claim_being_tested: Emitters with credit holdings need audit-ready credit ledger tracking
experiments.claim: Emitters with credit holdings need audit-ready credit ledger tracking
experiments.method: Landing page test — add credit banking audit value prop to TIER landing page and track interest (sign-ups for credit banking info)
experiments.success_threshold: ≥3 sign-ups specifically for credit banking in 30 days
experiments.decision_rule: If ≥3 sign-ups, H-CREDIT-1 is supported. If 0, credit banking is not a standalone need.
experiments.blocking_potential: LOW — credit banking is cross-sell, not primary

experiments.claim_being_tested: DI standard release will trigger demand for CEIP's DI sensitivity tool
experiments.claim: DI standard release will trigger demand for CEIP's DI sensitivity tool
experiments.method: Monitoring — track Alberta DI standard release timeline, prepare DI-specific landing page, monitor search interest for 'direct investment TIER' queries
experiments.success_threshold: DI standard released + ≥5 sign-ups for DI analysis in 30 days post-release
experiments.failure_threshold: DI standard delayed beyond Q2 2026 OR 0 sign-ups post-release
experiments.decision_rule: If DI standard released and sign-ups occur, H-TIER-3 is supported. If delayed, experiment is inconclusive.
experiments.duration: Ongoing until DI standard release + 30 days
experiments.blocking_potential: LOW — DI is catalyst, not primary hypothesis

experiments.claim_being_tested: Anti-spreadsheet positioning ('Stop using error-prone Excel for compliance') resonates more than 'Canadian energy compliance intelligence'
experiments.claim: Anti-spreadsheet positioning ('Stop using error-prone Excel for compliance') resonates more than 'Canadian energy compliance intelligence'
experiments.method: A/B landing page test — variant A: current positioning, variant B: anti-spreadsheet positioning. Track sign-up rate.
experiments.success_threshold: Variant B sign-up rate ≥ 2× variant A
experiments.failure_threshold: No significant difference or variant A wins
experiments.decision_rule: If variant B wins, H-CONTRA-1 is supported. If no difference, H-CONTRA-1 is disproven.
experiments.blocking_potential: LOW — positioning variant, not hypothesis blocker

experiments.claim_being_tested: DI standard release triggers demand spike for facility-level DI analysis tooling
experiments.claim: DI standard release triggers demand spike for facility-level DI analysis tooling
experiments.method: Monitoring + landing page test — track DI standard release timeline, deploy DI-specific landing page with lead capture, monitor organic search volume for 'direct investment TIER Alberta' and track sign-ups
experiments.success_threshold: DI standard released + search volume increases ≥50% + ≥5 sign-ups for DI analysis in 30 days post-release
experiments.failure_threshold: DI standard delayed beyond Q2 2026 OR 0 sign-ups post-release OR no search volume increase
experiments.decision_rule: If demand spike occurs, H-DI-1 is supported. If no spike, H-DI-1 is weakened.
experiments.duration: Ongoing until DI standard release + 30 days
experiments.falsification_potential: MEDIUM — depends on external timeline but directly tests demand spike
experiments.blocking_potential: MEDIUM — if no demand spike post-release, DI hypothesis is weakened

experiments.claim_being_tested: Credit banking audit is a natural cross-sell from TIER CFO memo usage
experiments.claim: Credit banking audit is a natural cross-sell from TIER CFO memo usage
experiments.method: Cross-sell test — during EXP-004 pilot (or standalone outreach to 10 TIER users), offer credit banking audit as add-on and track uptake
experiments.success_threshold: ≥2 of TIER users express interest in credit banking add-on OR ≥1 activates credit banking feature
experiments.failure_threshold: 0 interest from TIER users or all say 'we use traders for credits'
experiments.decision_rule: If ≥2 interested, H-CREDIT-2 is supported. If 0 interest, cross-sell assumption is disproven.
experiments.blocking_potential: LOW — cross-sell is secondary revenue, not primary beachhead

priority_ranking: EXP-001 (cheapest-falsification-first: landing page test for need)
EXP-004 (pilot: highest fidelity, highest cost to organize)
EXP-009 (DI demand spike: monitoring + landing page for H-DI-1)
